headline: Apple To Rally More Than 19%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Friday
summary: Citigroup cut RCL's price target, TD Cowen raised COHU's price target, JP Morgan cut SYK's price target, BNP Paribas slashed RIVN's price target, RBC Capital raised ZETA's price target, Stifel increased CHRW's price target, Piper Sandler raised TWLO's price target, and Wedbush raised ROKU's price target.

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Raises Price Target to $207
summary: Stifel  analyst J. Bruce Chan   maintains C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) with a Buy and raises the price target from $202 to $207.

headline: Tranche Update on C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc.'s Equity Buyback Plan announced on July 24, 2007.
summary: From January 1, 2026 to March 31, 2026, the company has repurchased 1,231,600 shares, representing 1.04% for $213.35 million. With this, the company has completed the repurchase of 79,297,570 shares,...
